title: Tag Claude in, right where you already work
summary: Anthropic released Claude Tag, a feature allowing teams to invoke Claude directly in Slack channels. Claude can access channel context, organizational tools, and maintain state across multi-day workflows by tagging @Claude in any thread.
writeup: The video covers Claude Tag, an Anthropic feature that lets teams invoke Claude directly inside Slack channels by tagging @Claude in any thread. It matters because it embeds the assistant where work already happens rather than in a separate interface. Key takeaways: Claude can read channel context, connect to organizational tools, and maintain state across multi-day workflows, positioning it as an agent that persists within ongoing conversations.
